name: agro-erp
description: Корневые скрипты: backend и frontend в отдельных папках

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.start:railway: npm run migrate --prefix backend && NODE_ENV=production npm run start --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.seed-demo: npm run seed-tech-cards --prefix backend && npm run seed-finance --prefix backend && npm run seed-waybills --prefix backend && npm run seed-warehouse --prefix backend
